name: Heterogeneous B200 + Cerebras WSE-3
description: Two heterogeneous nodes: node-0 holds 4 NVIDIA B200 GPUs, node-1 holds 4 Cerebras WSE-3 wafer-scale engines. All devices are connected point-to-point over the scale-up network; devices within a node also share an in-node CXL link to the (optional) node memory. A single datacenter NVM pool is the input device that holds all model weights at init.

network.notes: ESTIMATE - scale-up modeled point-to-point (no congestion/topology): ~1.8 TB/s NVLink-class link at ~1 us; in-node CXL ~64 GB/s (PCIe5 x16-class) at ~300 ns. Tune to the fabric you want to model.
